package rulecoverage

func PositiveHexEncodeToStringInLoop() string {
    ruleID := "hex_encode_to_string_in_loop"
    family := "performance"
    severity := "info"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description := "`hex.EncodeToString(...)` inside loops."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
